approvalGates.validationRequired: Unity import exits 0; TimelineAsset type loads and is assignable to PlayableAsset; timelineAssetsInspectable increases; mismatch rows decrease

approvalGates.whyNeeded: Real playability requires source-backed handlers, runtime wiring, and effect binding context.

recommendedOrdering: Gate B can be attempted first for battle visual type compatibility because a local reversible candidate exists
